projects.title: Bidder
projects.description: Bidder is a full-stack web application that simulates a live art auction and allows users to bid on artworks. Using Node.js and the MVC architectural pattern, this application is built to be user-friendly and scalable. I created the database schema and led the implementation of the PostgreSQL database.

projects.title: d8
projects.description: Created as part of the 2018 DigitalCrafts Immersive Coding Bootcamp. d8 is a web application that receives user input via a quiz. It outputs restaurant and movie suggestions in the user's area. I worked as a designer as part of a four-person team. I created the visual design of the project, first prototyping the design using Adobe XD and then implementing the styles using HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, and JavaScript.

projects.title: Blackjack
projects.description: A simple Blackjack card game built with jQuery, Bootstrap, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.

projects.title: A Television Experience
projects.description: The ATX Television Festival's fifth season embraced the theme of "A Television Experience." With this as a starting point, I designed a series of materials for the festival. This included an advertisement that appeared in Entertainment Weekly.
add-credit: Photo and logo courtesy ATX Television Festival.

projects.title: TV Fan
projects.description: A series of designs working around the festival's fourth season theme, "As Close to Heaven as a Fan Can Get". I designed the festival poster and program guide cover to after what I imagine would be a TV fan's favorite wall art.
add-credit: Photo and logo courtesy ATX Television Festival.
